title: Girlfriend of Steel install help Please
display_title: Girlfriend of Steel install help Please
wikitext:
[]: Girlfriend of Steel install help? Please?             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 13, 2006 9:37 pm Hi, my name's Sailor Star Dust and I just joined the forums today. (I didn't notice any "introduce yourself here" theard, sooo...) I've seen all of Eva (well, everything but "Rebirth") but want to be enlightened on the confusing aspects of it by the wise members of this forum. (ie: Just who in the hell is mystery Rei from episodes 1, 24(??) and 26? :shock: ) Any dang way, I recently downloaded the fantranslated version of Girlfriend of Steel (1) on my computer, and have no idea how to install it. Pressing install causes this EvangelonforWin95.ini file on my "compy" to appear, but I have no idea what I need to do to play the game. T_T My OS is Windows 2000, but that shouldn't cause a problem in terms of installing, should it? I'm really excited to be a forums member here! yoroshiku ne! :P

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Sun Aug 13, 2006 10:32 pm I had some trouble installing it too. My advice: just copy the contents of the CD image (or CD if you burned it onto a disc) into a folder on the C drive (C:\) called "eva95", and then go into the folder marked "exec", and find the file called "ADV2.exe". You can also make a shortcut of this file if you want, since it's the file you need to run in order to start the game. If you can get it installed using the actual installation program, then you probably don't need to bother with this procedure. However, when I tried to do a full install, it did not install the files completely, and the game would not run. So I did the copy-past technique and replaced all the files, and then I had the game working with the "official" shortcuts in tact.

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel install help? Please?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:31 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: (I didn't notice any "introduce yourself here" theard, sooo...)

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel install help? Please?             Quote Post by AuthenticM » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:39 am Mr. Tines wrote: 24? For 1 and 26' search for "bookends"

[]: Re: Girlfriend of Steel install help? Please?             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 14, 2006 1:51 am AuthenticM wrote: Also, what are 'bookends'?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Aug 15, 2006 4:22 pm Hmm...So I tried to do what was recommended but it still doesn't want to install. (at least I'm farther with this then I was before.) I copy and pasted the shortcut into the exec folder (from eva95), but it gives me this installtion error ("error reading from the disk") "textbmp.txt, textbmp.dat not found" and then when it closes it says "whereis_grp\bg01(.BMP) file not found". Also, what "contents of the cd image" do you mean? ie, what folder :? Thanks for your help so far!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Aug 20, 2006 1:04 pm Don't mean to double-post, but I just wanted to say I was able to get the game working fine. All I had to do was copy and past all the stuff in a new folder and it worked prefectly. Still, thanks for your help!
